title: Set up Convex real-time backend with queries, mutations, and file storage
summary: Install Convex, define a typed schema, write queries and mutations, wire up ConvexProvider in Next.js App Router, use real-time useQuery subscriptions in React components, and add file storage and scheduled functions.
declaration: I will set up Convex as the backend for this project. Convex provides a cloud database, TypeScript-first serverless functions, and real-time subscriptions with zero configuration — no separate API layer needed. The dev daemon syncs your functions on save. If you need a traditional REST API or already have Prisma/Supabase set up, say so before I begin.
